title: oberonia muriculata
intro: Oberonia muriculata is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia muriculata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Oberonia muriculata is often used in the form of extracts or infusions, which may be administered orally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
